summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of STARTON multi-page routing feature. All 22 test cases passed across all 5 pages (Home, Work, Services, Company, About) including navigation, content, interactions, theme toggle, contact form, and animated background verification.

issues: 1200ms loading spinner appears on every direct URL page load. This is intentional but may feel slow for returning visitors navigating between pages via React Router (spinner only shows on hard loads/refreshes, not SPA navigation)

critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.jsx: Theme state is not persisted to localStorage - toggling dark mode is reset on page refresh
Work.jsx filter data-testid uses triple dashes for 'Web & UX' -> 'filter-btn-web---ux'. Functional but slightly unusual testid convention
PageLayout.jsx: generateParticles() is called on every render, creating new random positions each time. Consider memoizing with useMemo to prevent unnecessary re-renders
seed_data_creation: 2 contact form submissions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages tested: Home (/), Work (/work), Services (/services), Company (/company), About (/about). All navigation, content sections, filter buttons, footer links, logo, theme toggle, contact form, and animated background confirmed working. No critical bugs found. Minor design suggestion: persist theme preference to localStorage.

test_results_detail.home_page: PASS - Hero, services section, process section, clients section, contact section all visible
test_results_detail.navigation_header: PASS - Work, Services (dropdown), Company (dropdown), About links + Start a Project button all functional
test_results_detail.work_page: PASS - Hero, stats bar (42+/96%/$50M+/3x), all 5 filter buttons, 6 project cards with correct filter behavior
test_results_detail.work_filter: PASS - Branding filter shows 2 cards, All filter shows all 6 cards
test_results_detail.services_page: PASS - 6 service cards, 3 Why STARTON cards, 4 process cards visible
test_results_detail.services_dropdown: PASS - Hover dropdown opens, clicking navigates to /services
test_results_detail.company_page: PASS - Approach (4 steps), 4 value cards, 3 team cards (Alex Rivera/Mia Chen/Jordan Lee), Careers section
test_results_detail.company_dropdown: PASS - Hover dropdown opens, clicking navigates to /company
test_results_detail.about_page: PASS - Mission statement, 3 belief cards (Craft Matters/Think Globally/Results Over Vanity), 6 timeline items
test_results_detail.about_navigation: PASS - Click About nav link navigates to /about
test_results_detail.footer_links: PASS - Our Projects -> /work, About -> /about both working
test_results_detail.start_project_inner: PASS - Navigates to home with scrollTo:contact state
test_results_detail.footer_start_project: PASS - Navigates to home from Company page
test_results_detail.theme_toggle: PASS - Adds/removes dark-theme class on html element
test_results_detail.contact_form: PASS - Form fills, submits, and clears on success
test_results_detail.logo_click: PASS - Logo navigates to home from inner pages
test_results_detail.animated_bg: PASS - animated-background, particles-container, grid-pattern, glow-orb present on ALL pages
